title: DFU - Emu/Tern - Charge Case update needed popup after earbud DFU
scenario: Post-DFU popup incorrectly directs user to Poly Lens Desktop for case update instead of allowing in-app case update on Device Home Screen
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
3. Connect to a pair of earbuds where both the earbuds and the charge case are on outdated firmware.
4. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the earbuds via the app.
5. Wait for the DFU to complete successfully.
6. Observe the Home screen after the update completes.
expected: After the DFU completes, the user should be returned to the Home screen with no popup, or a clear in-app prompt to update the case firmware within the Poly Studio Mobile app.
